category_sources: source_facts.description says Halide is a language for fast, portable data-parallel computation.
display_name_sources: source_facts.homepage uses the official halide-lang.org site and source_facts.repo uses the Halide GitHub organization casing.
docs_sources: Official project homepage at source_facts.homepage links to the Halide documentation surface.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already populated, so repo was not re-determined.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies data-parallel computation; official Halide project positioning describes a performance-oriented compiler/language commonly used for image and array processing.
